queries.question: Show me the style each photographer uses.
queries.sql: SELECT Styles.styleName  from Photographers_Styles join Styles on Photographers_Styles.styleId = Styles.id join Photographers on Photographers_Styles.photographerId = Photographers.id   GROUP BY Photographers_Styles.styleId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Photographers_Styles.photographerId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Photographers)

queries.question: Show me the style each photographer uses.
queries.sql: select photographers.name , styles.stylename from Photographers_Styles join Styles on Photographers_Styles.styleId = Styles.id join Photographers on Photographers_Styles.photographerId = Photographers.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?stylename WHERE {
  ?photographers_styles a :Photographers_Styles .
  ?styles a :Styles .
  ?photographers_styles p:hasStyles ?styles .
  ?photographers a :Photographers .
  ?photographers_styles p:hasPhotographers ?photographers .
  ?photographers p:name ?name .
  ?styles p:styleName ?stylename .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the style each photographer uses.
